title: Blurry images in 23
wikitext:
[]: Blurry images in '23             Quote Post by Ark » Thu Jul 31, 2008 4:27 pm Does anyone have a link to those blurry images in the original directors cut of ep 23 when Ritsuko destroy's all the spare Reis. Also I'd like to know where those come from originally. I know this is a little after the fact (for most of you) but I must say I'm really peeved at some of the changes they've made with the Platinum edition. They took all that stuff out and the sound has been changed for the worse in some places as well. Many thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Jul 31, 2008 4:40 pm There's a page about this on the evapedia: http://evageeks.org/FGP/The_Tank_Images

[]: i think i can             Quote Post by IX » Thu Jul 31, 2008 4:41 pm i beleave that the pix are NERV/SEELE "growing" eva 01 from lilith if im wrong tell me but i am fairly sure

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 31, 2008 5:03 pm I wrote a little program to subtract out the tank background (subtracting a frame without one of the images from one close by in time with an image) and used it on some of the less decipherable superpositions. Try here http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x1.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x2.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x3.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x4.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x4a.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x5.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x6.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x7.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x8.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff-x9.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff1112.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff1113.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff1113a.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff1114.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff1114a.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff18.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff18a.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff20.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff20a.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff21.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff21a.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff22.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff24.png http://www.ravnaandtines.com/eva/diff2930.png Enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Thu Jul 31, 2008 5:35 pm Would it work to subtract a non-Renewal frame from its equivalent Renewal frame to get the tank image on its own, or would finding exact matches be too much of a pain?

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Jul 31, 2008 11:09 pm I don't understand the point of putting subliminal images that are hard to read even with a still frame shot. It's interesting, but why should people have to dig so ridiculously hard just to get the meanings? It's good to work, but it shouldn't take as much effort as it takes the members of this forum to decode the images. Still, the images that can be seen are very relevant to the discussion in the scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 01, 2008 2:53 am Monk Ed wrote: Would it work to subtract a non-Renewal frame from its equivalent Renewal frame

Also I'd like to know where those come from originally. I know this is a little after the fact (for most of you) but I must say I'm really peeved at some of the changes they've made with the Platinum edition.
